title: Theme of NERV
wikitext:
[]: Theme of NERV             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 09, 2011 4:36 pm For those of you with access to S2 Works and a working knowledge of classical music: Track A-16, the Theme of NERV, samples a very famous piece of classical music. I know I've heard it before, but I can't for the life of me put my finger on it and it's driving me crazy. Anyone know the inspiration for this piece?

[]:             Quote Post by LordEvan88 » Sun Apr 10, 2011 11:55 am I wouldn't call it a piece of classical music, but the track borrows the main theme of 'The Magnificent Seven'.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Apr 10, 2011 12:25 pm LordEvan88 wrote: I wouldn't call it a piece of classical music, but the track borrows the main theme of 'The Magnificent Seven'.
